title: Cellulitis Progression — Two Floodwater Wound Cases
description: Celestine Arceneaux's informal case notes, written on the back of an MRE accessory pack wrapper, document two floodwater wound cases: one child, one elderly male. Both show erythema and localized swelling consistent with Aeromonas hydrophila exposure. The notation reads: '24-48 hrs to systemic without abx.' The pharmaceutical lot number on the skiff crate matches the antibiotic formulation.
